chosen_action.title: Escalate cleared post-hold empty-board states into distribution architecture repair

why_this_action.summary: The active short review window still had no truthful do-now packet, and this hold window had already used rerun-focused repair slots. The highest-leverage remaining action was to harden the selector so the scheduled post-hold rerun cannot silently fall back to another idle measurement hold when the execution board is still empty.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: current measurement hold releases at 2026-05-25T02:05:05
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists in the current review window
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and same-run runtime repairs are explicitly in scope
marketing_2026-05-24_234934_active_loop_prompt_repair.md + marketing_2026-05-24_235759_post_hold_reentry_contract_repair.json: this hold window already spent slots on rerun-improvement work

result.summary: Patched the distribution-lane selector to escalate a cleared short-window + empty-execution-board measurement-hold state into distribution_architecture_repair, and added regression coverage.
